summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChitraKalakar API and UI. All 19 backend tests passed. Verified: Health check returns healthy, Public Artists API returns ALL registered artists (2 artists including non-member), Exhibitions API returns data with exhibition_images/exhibition_paintings columns, Admin exhibition controls (Extend/Pause/Resume/Delete) exist with proper auth protection, Artist exhibition controls (Request Pause/Delete) exist with proper data-testid attributes, Communities API works without errors.

minor.issue: Returns 200 but logs error: 'Could not find the table public.notifications in the schema cache' - notifications table may not exist in Supabase

issues: Many exhibitions show 'No painting uploaded' placeholder - this is expected for exhibitions created before database columns were added per main agent note

action_items: Consider creating 'notifications' table in Supabase if notification feature is needed
New exhibitions created via admin panel will properly store and display paintings (existing exhibitions without artwork data are expected)
critical_code_review_comments: Public Artists API correctly returns ALL registered artists (not just members) - fix verified working
Exhibitions API includes exhibition_images, exhibition_paintings, primary_exhibition_image columns - fix verified working
Admin exhibition controls (Extend, Pause/Resume, Delete) properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Artist exhibition controls (Request Pause, Request Delete) properly implemented with data-testid attributes
All protected endpoints properly return 401/403 when accessed without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been fixed and verified. Public Artists API returns 2 artists (1 member, 1 non-member). Exhibitions API returns 9 exhibitions with proper columns. Admin/Artist exhibition control endpoints are auth-protected and have proper UI buttons. Communities API returns empty array (no communities created yet). Cart/Order endpoints require authentication.

verified_fixes.public_artists_api: Returns ALL registered artists (2 total: 1 member, 1 non-member) - FIX VERIFIED
verified_fixes.exhibitions_api: Returns exhibition_images, exhibition_paintings, primary_exhibition_image columns - FIX VERIFIED
verified_fixes.admin_exhibition_controls: Extend, Pause/Resume, Delete buttons exist with proper data-testid - VERIFIED
verified_fixes.artist_exhibition_controls: Request Pause, Request Delete buttons exist with proper data-testid - VERIFIED
verified_fixes.health_check: Returns healthy status with database connected - VERIFIED
